keyword_bank_notes: biohackers and premium lifestyle are especially relevant for social media sources — prioritize these when adding Instagram, TikTok, or LinkedIn sources later.

sources.name: NutraIngredients Europe
sources.note: Serves the US edition by default — always keep "Europe" in the query and focus on European companies.

sources.name: Nutraceutical Business Review
sources.note: Many articles are paywalled — titles are visible in search, but full text may be blocked. Extract company names from titles/snippets when needed.
